sidebar.folderNameHint: Custom folders are synced to the IMAP server.
sidebar.deleteFolderConfirmText: Delete folder "{name}"? Only empty folders can be deleted right now.
sidebar.selectAccountToView: Select an account to view its folders.
sidebar.addAccountToStart: Add an account to get started.
sidebar.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure you want to delete {name} ({email})? All local data for this account will be removed.
sidebar.pop3LimitedFeatures: POP3 only supports inbox and starred, operations are local only

mailList.noSearchResultsHint: Try a different keyword or clear the search.
mailList.emptyFolder: This folder is empty for now.

reader.noMatchingMessageHint: The current search did not match any cached messages in this folder.
reader.noMessageSelectedHint: This folder is empty or no message is currently selected.
reader.selectMessageHint: Choose a message from the list to start reading.
reader.imagesBlocked: Some images in this email have been blocked.

composer.subject: Subject
composer.dropAttachments: Drag files here to add attachments
composer.dropAttachmentsHint: You can also keep using the Attach button.

status.serverSavedWithLocalChanges: Local changes not saved to server

recovery.title: Unsaved draft found
recovery.message: You have an unsaved draft from a previous session. Would you like to restore it or start fresh?
recovery.existingMessage: This draft has newer local edits than the copy saved in Drafts. Do you want to restore the local version or open the saved version?

closePrompt.title: When closing MailYou
closePrompt.description: Do you want MailYou to keep running in the background after the window closes? It will hide to the tray and continue syncing mail and notifications.
closePrompt.alwaysBackground: Always keep running in the background

security.title: Encrypted storage
security.keyringUnavailableDescription: MailYou cannot safely protect local encryption keys on this device right now. Set a master password or fix the system credential manager before continuing.
security.keyringUnavailableSummary: The system keyring is unavailable. Set a master password or fix the credential manager before using encrypted local storage.
security.unlockDescription: This device is using an optional master password. Enter it to unlock accounts, mail, and contacts stored locally.
security.enabledSummary: A master password is required after app restart before local mail data can be read.
security.disabledSummary: No master password is configured. Local encryption relies on the system keyring only.
security.optionalHint: This is optional. If you enable it, MailYou will ask for the password on next launch before loading local data.
security.passwordMismatch: Passwords must match and be at least 8 characters long.
security.updateFailed: Failed to update the master password.
security.disableFailed: Failed to remove the master password.
security.lockFailed: Failed to lock the current session.

accountSetup.title: Account setup
accountSetup.heading: Connect a new mailbox
accountSetup.emailHint: Enter your email first. MailYou will detect the provider and sign-in method.
accountSetup.enterValidEmail: Enter a valid email address to continue.
accountSetup.oauthProviderHint: OAuth opens in your browser. Authorize, test, then save.
accountSetup.oauthDirectUnavailable: Local client credentials are not configured for this provider.
accountSetup.customProviderSummary: No preset found. Please fill in the server fields below.
accountSetup.serverPresetApplied: Using built-in server settings. Turn on advanced mode to edit them.
accountSetup.identitiesHint: Configure aliases, reply-to addresses, and signatures for this mailbox.

shell.confirmDeleteText: Are you sure you want to delete this message? It will be moved to Trash.

shell.chooseAccountHint: Choose an account to load its mailbox
shell.failedToLoadMailbox: Failed to load mailbox. Please try again.
shell.failedToLoadMessages: Failed to load messages. Please try again.

labels.manageHint: Add, remove, or organize labels for this message.
labels.deleteConfirm: Delete label "{label}"? It will be removed from all messages in this account.
